use_cases: Decorative retro-themed component for entertainment or media websites
Playful loading screen animation with nostalgic DVD bouncing visual
Fun 404 page or idle screen for entertainment platforms
Easter egg or surprise interactive element for creative web apps
Retro branding visual for media or streaming service landing pages
ai_summary: A skeuomorphic retro TV component that displays a bouncing DVD logo animation inside a stylized TV frame. Features decorative power and volume buttons, speaker grilles, and optional color-cycling effects. The bouncing logo animation references the classic Windows DVD screensaver meme, making it a fun nostalgic element for entertainment, media, or creative websites.
